description: Multiple unspecified vulnerabilities in Menalto Gallery before 2.2.4 have unknown impact, related to (1) "hotlink protection" in the URL rewrite module, (2) a WebDAV view in the WebDAV module, (3) a comment view in the Comment module, (4) unspecified "item information disclosure attacks" in the Core module Gallery application, (5) the slideshow in the Slideshow module, and (6) multiple Print modules.
